nasb.text: but supposed Him to be in the caravan, and went a day’s journey; and they began looking for Him among their relatives and acquaintances.

esv.text: but supposing him to be in the group they went a day’s journey, but then they began to search for him among their relatives and acquaintances,

cnv.text: 還以為他在同行的人中間。走了一天，就在親戚和熟人中找他，

ccb.text: 还以为祂跟在同行的人中间。他们走了一天的路后，才开始在亲戚朋友中找祂，

csbs.text: 以为他在同行的人群中。他们走了一天的路，才开始在亲戚和熟人中找他。
